summary: Tested Purchase Entry with Supplier dropdown from Party Master and Admin Data Management Excel export/import for parties. All 12 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified with supplier dropdown populated from Party Master, 'Add in Party Master' link visible, and parties included in Excel data sources.
critical_code_review_comments: Purchase Entry correctly uses Party Master for supplier selection
Supplier dropdown filters parties by party_type='supplier'
'Add in Party Master' link properly directs users to add missing suppliers
Parties data source included in Excel Import/Export with 623 records
All 7 data sources available: Customers, Parties, Dealers, Orders, Warranties, Master SKUs, Inventory
seed_data_creation: Test suppliers created: ABC Electronics Supplier, Delhi Battery Works. Test purchases created as drafts.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Purchase Entry now uses Party Master for supplier selection. Suppliers are filtered from parties collection where party_types includes 'supplier'. Admin Data Management includes 'parties' as a data source for Excel import/export.

features_tested.GET /api/parties: PASS - Returns all parties, can filter by party_type=supplier
features_tested.GET /api/purchases: PASS - Returns purchases with supplier info
features_tested.POST /api/purchases: PASS - Creates purchase with supplier from Party Master
features_tested.GET /api/firms: PASS - Returns firms for purchase creation
features_tested.GET /api/raw-materials: PASS - Returns raw materials for purchase items
features_tested.GET /api/master-skus: PASS - Returns master SKUs for purchase items
features_tested.GET /api/admin/excel/export/parties: PASS - Exports parties as Excel file
features_tested.Frontend - Purchase Register: PASS - New Purchase button, supplier dropdown with data-testid='supplier-select'
features_tested.Frontend - Supplier Dropdown: PASS - Shows suppliers from Party Master (ABC Electronics Supplier, Delhi Battery Works)
features_tested.Frontend - Add in Party Master link: PASS - Link visible: 'Supplier not in list? Add in Party Master'
features_tested.Frontend - Admin Data Management: PASS - Shows 7 data source cards including Parties (623 records)
